title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama—chat, generate, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; chat, generate, pull, delete models via Ollama’s REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat endpoint in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style) with multi-model chats, file uploads, markdown, dark mode.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper with history, syntax highlighting and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat interface.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model; supports threads, slash commands and moderation.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama4j
summary: Lightweight Java client for Ollama exposing chat, generate, embeddings and model management APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem to integrate local Ollama models into Rails or Ruby scripts.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET SDK for Ollama with async enumerable streaming and dependency injection helpers.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features in pipelines.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nixpkgs derivation for Ollama enabling reproducible local LLM deployments on NixOS.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run private LLM summarization and Q&A on your vault notes via Ollama.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that adds Ollama-powered block summarization and semantic search to your knowledge graph.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Ready-to-use Docker Compose stacks for Ollama with GPU support, Open-WebUI and optional Milvus vector store.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that answers channel questions using local Ollama models; supports threads, app mentions and rate limits.
